(base) mnatsakanyan@MherPC2025:~/repos/machine_learning_compilers/tasks/series_1$ aarch64-linux-gnu-g++ main.cpp transpose_cab.s -o mainn.exe -static
(base) mnatsakanyan@MherPC2025:~/repos/machine_learning_compilers/tasks/series_1$ qemu-aarch64 ./mainn.exe
